intro.title: Workplace Culture Fit
intro.subhead: See which US workplace habits already fit you — and which are worth practicing.
intro.outcome: You will get a map of your workplace strengths and the habits to practice, each with a tip.

page.culture_why: For each one, how does it feel to you right now? Be honest — there are no wrong answers.

results.title: Your Culture Fit
results.narrative_h: Here's what we heard about you
results.narrative_body: Some US workplace habits already fit how you like to work. Others may take practice — that is completely normal, and every one can be learned.
results.map_lead: What already fits you, and what is worth practicing.
results.strengths_empty: You are still finding your footing — that is okay. Pick one habit to start with.
results.watchouts_empty: Nothing felt hard — wonderful. Keep doing what works for you.
results.cta_body: Take your culture map to the Workplace Culture workshop. Your CSC specialist can help you practice the hard ones.
results.cta_link: Go to the Workplace Culture workshop →
